zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Badlesmere於大約1308年出生在英國肯特巴德萊斯莫時，她的父親Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere34歲，母親Margaret de Clare22歲。她於1334年與John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1366年5月24日在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年59歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Badlesmere于大约1308年出生在英国肯特巴德萊斯莫时，她的父亲Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere34岁，母亲Margaret de Clare22岁。她于1334年与John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1366年5月24日在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內享年59岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Badlesmere was born about 1308, in Badlesmere, Kent, England, her father, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, was 34 and her mother, Margaret de Clare, was 22. She married John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford in 1334, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 May 1366, in Earls Colne, Essex, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Badlesmere est née environ 1308, à Badlesmere, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Clare, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford en 1334, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1366, à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Badlesmere um 1308 in Badlesmere, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere 34 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Clare 22. Sie hat 1334 in Oxfordshire, England John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1366 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Earls Colne, Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Badlesmere è nata il circa 1308 nel Badlesmere, Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Clare, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford nel 1334, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 maggio 1366, nel Earls Colne, Essex, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Badlesmereが約1308年にイギリスケントバドレスメアで生まれた時，父Sir Bartholomew Badlesmereは34歳，母Margaret de Clareは22歳であった。1334年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJohn de Vere 7th Earl of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1366年5月24日にイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンで59歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Badlesmere(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 켄트 바들레스머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Clare(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1334년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1366년 5월 24일 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Badlesmere nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Clare, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford em 1334, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1366, em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Badlesmere родилась около 1308 г. в местности бадлесмир, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Clare, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford в 1334 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 мая 1366 г. в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Badlesmere nació aproximadamente 1308, en Badlesmere, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Bartholomew Badlesmere, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Clare, tenía 22 años. Se casó con John de Vere 7th Earl of Oxford en 1334, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1366, en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.
